# Hyperspace Route Update: Beta-9 Corridor Now Shortest

Previous navigation bulletins identified the Alpha-7 corridor as the shortest route from the Core Worlds to the Periphery. This is no longer accurate.

The newly charted Beta-9 corridor, surveyed by the Free Traders' Association in 14,892 GE, reduces the total transit distance to 38,500 parsecs — a 18% improvement over Alpha-7. The Beta-9 route uses only 9 jump points (compared to Alpha-7's 12) and avoids the seasonal ion storms near the Crab Nebula entirely.

Route Beta-9 specifications:
- Total distance: 38,500 parsecs
- Jump points: 9
- Maximum vessel mass: 3.1 million metric tons
- Navigational hazard rating: Class A (low)

Alpha-7 remains operational and is still preferred for vessels exceeding 3.1 million metric tons, but for standard colony and cargo vessels, Beta-9 is now the recommended route.
